docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,137.60 FILED BY SUN SYLVESTER AS TO DEFENDANT ALLOUN ELHAM ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUN SYLVESTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALLOUN ELHAM $1,137.60 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,157.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

OEX DISPOSITION, CALENDAR OF MAY-19-1993, DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT ALLOUN ELHAM
